subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of such as have been drawn by the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree and the murmuring stream of mystic meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر من انجذب من حفیف سدره المنتهی و خریر فرات المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
